company.name: Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals
company.subtitle: REDEMPLO launched (FCS) · sHTG Phase 3 topline Q3 2026 · RNAi platform + obesity

market.notes: REDEMPLO FCS launched US Nov 2025. sHTG Phase 3 (SHASTA-3/4, ~750pts + MUIR-3, ~1450pts) topline Q3 2026. BTD for sHTG. sNDA by year-end 2026. 2yr OLE: -83% TG reduction, 96% <500 mg/dL, zero pancreatitis. Quarterly SC dosing. Peak >$2B if sHTG approved. Direct competitor to Ionis olezarsen.
ANGPTL3 inhibitor for mixed dyslipidemia. Phase 3 ongoing. Lowers TG + LDL + non-HDL. Complements plozasiran for broader lipid franchise. Competitor: evinacumab (Regeneron, approved for HoFH).
First dual-target RNAi: PCSK9 + APOC3 in single molecule. Phase 1/2a dosing started. If it works: one injection replaces two drugs. Interim data H2 2026.

ARO-INHBE (INHBE target) + ARO-ALK7 — early obesity RNAi candidates. Phase 1/2a interim data at JPM 2026 showed encouraging signals. Massive TAM but very early. Complements GLP-1s (lean mass preservation potential).
First RNAi to cross blood-brain barrier using TRiM platform. Targets tau protein. Phase 1 in healthy volunteers, data 2026. If TRiM BBB penetration validated: paradigm shift for CNS RNAi.

mega_bear.narrative: sHTG Phase 3 fails + olezarsen wins the TG market + platform commoditized
events: ✗ SHASTA-3/4 miss primary or safety signal (liver)
✗ Olezarsen (Ionis) captures sHTG market first — ARWR late to party
✗ Obesity programs too early, no differentiation vs GLP-1s
→ REDEMPLO FCS niche revenue only, $8.9B cap deflates to $3-4B

bear.narrative: sHTG approved but second-to-market vs olezarsen — share split
events: ✓ sHTG Phase 3 positive but olezarsen already on market
✗ Market share split 50/50 — peak $1B not $2B+
~ Obesity and CNS too early to value
→ Plozasiran franchise solid but not dominant

base.narrative: sHTG approved + zodasiran expands lipid franchise + obesity generates excitement
events: ✓ SHASTA-3/4 positive — sNDA filed year-end 2026
✓ Plozasiran quarterly dosing differentiates vs monthly olezarsen
✓ Zodasiran Phase 3 on track — broad lipid franchise forming
~ Obesity/CNS early data generates partnership interest

bull.narrative: Cardiometabolic RNAi leader — TG + lipid + obesity + CNS platform
events: ✓ Plozasiran >$2B peak — quarterly dosing wins sHTG market
✓ Zodasiran + ARO-DIMER-PA build $5B+ lipid franchise
✓ Obesity RNAi data strong — GLP-1 combo potential
✓ TRiM CNS platform validated — Alzheimer's RNAi within reach

psychedelic_bull.narrative: RNAi platform dominance — cardiometab + obesity + CNS — Novartis/Amgen acquires
events: ✓ Plozasiran $3B+ — best-in-class quarterly TG control
✓ ARO-DIMER-PA single injection replaces statin+fibrate — paradigm shift
✓ Obesity RNAi becomes standard GLP-1 combo — lean mass preservation
✓ Novartis or Amgen acquires for $25-30B to own cardiometab RNAi

lastData.title: Plozasiran 2yr OLE: -83% TG, zero pancreatitis
points: REDEMPLO FCS approved US (Nov 2025), Canada, China
2yr OLE: median -83% TG reduction, 96% achieved <500 mg/dL
Zero adjudicated acute pancreatitis across 2yr OLE
ARO-MAPT (tau/Alzheimer's) first subjects dosed — TRiM BBB platform

nextCatalyst.title: SHASTA-3/4 sHTG Phase 3 topline data
thresholds: Primary: % TG reduction vs placebo at 12 months
Head-to-head positioning vs olezarsen (Ionis) timing matters
Also H2 2026: ARO-DIMER-PA and ARO-MAPT interim data

risks: Direct competition with Ionis olezarsen — same market, same mechanism class
Olezarsen may get sHTG approval first (PDUFA Apr 3, 2026) — first-mover advantage
Complex revenue model (milestones + royalties + own products)
Obesity RNAi very early — years from commercialization
TRiM CNS platform unproven in humans — BBB penetration is hard
Sarepta collaboration revenue lumpy and declining
Stock volatile — $29 to $124 range in past 12 months
